content: Mars has two small natural satellites, or moons. Their names are Phobos and Deimos, which in Greek mythology are the twin sons of Ares, the god of war (equivalent to the Roman god Mars).
raw_content: Mars has two small natural satellites, or moons. Their names are Phobos and Deimos, which in Greek mythology are the twin sons of Ares, the god of war (equivalent to the Roman god Mars).
